title: UX Flow and AI-Human Interaction Design
description: Design the user journey and AI interaction patterns. Create a dashboard concept that consolidates multi-platform activity and goal tracking.

title: High-Level System Architecture Design
description: Design the high-level system architecture for the bizrunner app. Include data flow for AI decision-making and secure multi-platform integration.

title: API and Security Research
description: Research API capabilities for Etsy, Fiverr, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Gmail, Facebook, Canva, and Kittl. Identify how to automate listings, posts, and content creation. Research secure payment/bank transfer integrations.

title: Backend Project Initialization and Skeleton
description: Initialize the bizrunner backend repository. Set up the project structure, database schema (PostgreSQL), and an initial LangGraph framework for the agentic loop. Use the tech spec in /home/team/shared/tech_spec.md as a guide.

title: Detailed Wireframes and Interaction Mapping
description: Create high-fidelity wireframes and a detailed interaction map for the 'Review Queue' and 'Conversational Dashboard'. Define the UI components for editing AI-generated content.

title: Frontend Project Initialization and Dashboard Shell
description: Initialize the bizrunner frontend project using Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Implement the skeleton for the Conversational Dashboard and the Onboarding flow as per the UX specs in /home/team/shared/detailed_ux_mapping.md.

title: Etsy and Meta Integration (OAuth & Basic Actions)
description: Implement the OAuth 2.0 authentication flow for Etsy and Meta (Instagram/Facebook) and set up the initial API connectors for listing/posting. Integrate with the LangGraph agent skeleton.

title: Deep Dive: Canva and TikTok API Scopes
description: Perform deep-dive research into the Canva Connect API and TikTok Direct Post API scopes. Document the exact requirements for 'headless' template manipulation and direct video posting.

title: Architecting for Millionaire-Scale Growth
description: Design 'Scale-to-Million' features. Research and architect components for high-volume business management: bulk content generation, cross-platform campaign synchronization, advanced ROI forecasting, and automated inventory/stock management for digital products.

title: Canva Enterprise Fallback UX Design
description: Design the 'Canva Fallback' flow for non-enterprise users. Create a UI that guides users to either upgrade to Canva Enterprise for full automation or use the 'Design Import' / manual upload method.

title: Stripe Connect & Payment Link Integration
description: Implement Stripe Connect integration for secure payment processing and direct bank transfers. Set up the onboarding flow for sellers and the mechanism to generate unique payment links for social media.

title: OAuth Integration and Review Queue UI
description: Implement OAuth callback handling and dynamic platform connection status on the dashboard. Add UI components for the 'Review Queue' to show drafts from Etsy and Instagram.

title: ROI Attribution and BigQuery Research
description: Research advanced ROI attribution and forecasting models for multi-platform business scaling. Investigate how to integrate BigQuery for real-time analytics and attribution of sales to specific social content across TikTok, Instagram, and Etsy. Document in /home/team/shared/roi_forecasting_research.md.

title: Conversational Edit Result UX Design
description: Design the UI for the 'Conversational Edit Bar' results. Define how the AI highlights changes after a user gives a natural language command (e.g., 'Make it more playful'). Create wireframes for the highlighting and side-by-side comparison states.

title: Trend Research Sub-Agent Implementation
description: Implement the 'Trend Research' sub-agent using RAG. This agent should ingest data from social media and marketplace APIs to identify trending niches and products, then feed these insights back to the Orchestrator.

title: Frontend-Backend API Integration
description: Connect the 'Review Queue' and 'Conversational Dashboard' to the backend APIs. Ensure that real drafts and insights from the AI are displayed and can be acted upon by the user.

title: Autonomous Background Worker & Agent Loop Trigger
description: Implement the 'Autonomous Background Worker'. This service will run in the background, triggering the AI Agentic Loop at scheduled intervals. It should handle the flow: Research -> Content Generation -> Draft Preparation -> User Notification. It must support both 'Auto-Post' (if permitted) and 'Review-First' modes.

title: Internalized Media Processing Service (FFmpeg/ImageMagick)
description: Implement the Internalized Media Processing service. Set up a worker service that uses FFmpeg for video rendering (clip stitching, overlays, subtitles) and ImageMagick/Sharp for image transformations. This service must be able to process requests from the Content Generation sub-agent without relying on external paid APIs.

title: Market Intelligence Sub-Agent Implementation
description: Implement the 'Market Intelligence' scraper/analyzer sub-agent as per market_intelligence_flow.md. This sub-agent should identify best-sellers on Etsy, visual trends on Pinterest/TikTok, and extract trend features (style, features, keywords) to inform product creation.

title: Email Automation Service Implementation
description: Implement the 'Email Automation' service using the Gmail API as per email_automation_architecture.md. This service should handle automated 'Thank You' emails, review requests, and customer trust building post-purchase.

title: Approval Gate and Security Implementation
description: Implement the 'Approval Gate' logic and the 'approvals' table in the database as per orchestration_and_security_blueprint.md. This must include 'interrupt' states for high-risk actions (publishing, payments, subscriptions) and the 'SubscriptionGuard' to prevent unauthorized purchases.

title: Approval Gate and Financial UI Implementation
description: Implement the 'Approval Gate' UI components. This includes the 'Review Queue' logic for approving/rejecting drafts, and specific 'Financial Gate' popups for subscriptions and bank transfers. Ensure clear 'Verified Secure' indicators are present.

title: Final System Integration Review and Handover Documentation
description: Perform a comprehensive final review of the integrated bizrunner platform. Ensure all sub-agents (Trend Research, Market Intelligence, Orchestrator) and services (Media, Stripe, Email, Approval) are working cohesively. Prepare a 'Final Project Handover' document in /home/team/shared/final_handover.md detailing how the user can start their millionaire-scale journey.

title: Integrated System Smoke Test Implementation
description: Implement a 'Smoke Test' script in the backend that simulates a full autonomous loop: Trend Research -> Market Intelligence -> Media Generation -> Draft Creation -> Notification. This script should verify that all sub-agents and services are communicating correctly.

title: UX Simplicity Audit and Refinement
description: Conduct a 'Simplicity Audit' of the current frontend implementation. Identify any friction points in the onboarding or review flow and suggest UI refinements to make the 'Strategic Partner' experience feel even more effortless. Document findings in /home/team/shared/ux_simplicity_audit.md.

title: Beta Test Plan Design
description: Design a comprehensive Beta Test plan for bizrunner. This should include specific test cases for: 1. Goal activation and trend research. 2. Automated media synthesis and 'distinctive' design creation. 3. Social media 'Direct Post' (mocked). 4. Financial Gate interception and Stripe payment link generation. 5. Background worker autonomous loop. Document in /home/team/shared/beta_test_plan.md.

title: Production: Live Integration Guide
description: Create a 'Live Integration Guide' for the user. This document should explain exactly where and how to safely input their real API keys (Etsy, Stripe, Meta, etc.) into the secure dashboard now that we are moving to production. Focus on security and ease of use.

title: Production: Backend & Vault Activation
description: Transition the backend to production mode. 1. Initialize the production database (Turso/Postgres). 2. Activate the AES-256 encryption vault for real credentials. 3. Ensure the .env template is ready for the user's real keys. 4. Verify the background worker is ready for its first live autonomous loop.

title: Production: Frontend Build & Security UI
description: Prepare the final production build of the Next.js dashboard. 1. Ensure all mock flags are ready to be toggled to 'live'. 2. Verify responsiveness and performance for the public URL. 3. Implement the final 'Secure Vault' UI for API key entry.

title: High-Scale Architecture Design (20k Users)
description: Design a high-level architecture plan to support 20,000 concurrent users without lag. Focus on load balancing, database scaling (SQLite/Turso), and caching strategies. Document the plan in /home/team/shared/SCALING_PLAN.md.

title: Design Empire Switcher Sidebar
description: Design the "Empire Switcher" sidebar. It should allow users to seamlessly switch between their 5 businesses. Each business in the sidebar should have a distinct visual indicator (e.g., brand color or logo) and show a quick status overview (revenue milestone progress). Design for zero-lag interaction. Save mockups/design notes to /home/team/shared/designs/empire_switcher.md.

title: Implement Backend Scaling Strategies (20k Users)
description: Implement high-scale backend optimizations based on the approved SCALING_PLAN.md. 1. Set up BullMQ for asynchronous AI/media tasks. 2. Configure Turso for read replicas. 3. Integrate Redis for session and research caching. 4. Implement WebSocket support for real-time status updates.

title: Frontend: Implement Empire Switcher Sidebar
description: Implement the "Empire Switcher" sidebar in the React/Next.js frontend. Follow the UX designs in /home/team/shared/designs/empire_switcher.md once finalized. Ensure smooth transitions and zero-lag switching between business contexts. Integrate with the backend's WebSocket status updates.

title: Security & Data Sovereignty Research
description: Research and define a 'Security & Data Sovereignty Standard' for EmpireLaunchAI. Focus on: 1. Fail-safe mechanisms against hacking (WAF, rate limiting, intrusion detection). 2. Multi-tenant data isolation to ensure Subscriber A's data never leaks to Subscriber B. 3. Zero-Knowledge proofs or similar protocols to ensure sensitive data (bank info, API keys) is never accessible even to platform admins. 4. Privacy compliance (GDPR/CCPA) regarding third-party data sharing. Document the findings in /home/team/shared/SECURITY_HARDENING.md.

title: Implement Security Hardening & Private Tracking
description: Implement the security hardening and private revenue tracking backend based on /home/team/shared/SECURITY_HARDENING.md. 1. Set up Row-Level Security (RLS) for multi-tenant isolation. 2. Implement 'Admin Blindness' using Envelope Encryption (AES-256 + KMS) for sensitive data. 3. Develop the 'Private Revenue Oracle' using Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) or isolated aggregation logic to track $1,000 milestones without exposing transaction details. 4. Configure WAF and IDS/IPS monitoring.

title: Research & Create Business Wisdom Database
description:
Compile a comprehensive 'Business Wisdom & Tooling' database for EmpireLaunchAI. This should include:
1. Platform Fees: List the fees for Etsy ($0.20/listing, etc.), Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, TikTok Shop, etc.
2. Tool Recommendations: Identify essential and complementary tools for various business niches (Digital Marketing, Print-on-Demand, Dropshipping).
3. Cost Analysis: Provide pricing for each tool (Free vs. Paid tiers, e.g., Canva, CapCut, Adobe).
4. Onboarding Checklist: Map out the step-by-step requirements to open accounts on each major platform (TikTok, Etsy, Shopify, etc.).

Save this as a JSON artifact in /home/team/shared/business_wisdom.json.

title: Design Onboarding Wizard UI & Consultant Interface
description: Design a step-by-step onboarding flow for new business setup. This should include an 'All-Knowing' consultant interface that walks users through creating accounts (TikTok, Etsy, Shopify, Amazon, Pinterest) if they don't exist. Include interactive checklists, 'Platform Wisdom' tooltips (e.g., listing fees, best apps to use), and the 'Full Automation' (Empire Mode) toggle design.

title: Implement Universal Listing Engine & Full Automation Logic
description:
Implement the 'Universal Listing Engine' for automated business execution. This includes:
1. Platform Guideline Library: Integrate the requirements for Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon (titles, tags, image specs) from /home/team/shared/business_wisdom.json.
2. Automated Publishing Service: Build the backend logic to programmatically create listings on Etsy (OpenAPI v3), Shopify (GraphQL/REST Admin API), and Amazon Seller Central.
3. 'Empire Mode' Automation: Implement the logic for the 'Full Auto' toggle that allows the AI to research, create, and publish items without manual approval based on user goals.
4. Compliance Guardrails: Add pre-publish validation to ensure all listings meet platform standards to prevent account flags.

Ensure 'Admin Blindness' is maintained for all credentials used during this process.

title: Implement Onboarding Wizard & AI Consultant UI
description:
Implement the new Onboarding Wizard and AI Consultant Interface based on the UX designs and specifications.
Requirements:
1. Multi-step Onboarding Flow: Build the 4-step wizard (Empire Identity, Platform Matrix, AI Consultant, Automation Calibration).
2. Platform Matrix Grid: Implement the grid UI showing connection statuses and 'Consult AI' triggers.
3. AI Consultant Interface: Build the conversational side-panel/overlay with interactive checklists and wisdom tooltips.
4. Empire Mode Toggle: Implement the high-end toggle for switching between Co-Pilot and Empire modes.
5. Progress Constellation: Build the custom visual progress indicator.

Refer to:
- Spec: /home/team/shared/designs/onboarding_wizard_spec.md
- Mockups: /home/team/shared/designs/*.png
- Business Data: /home/team/shared/business_wisdom.json (for tooltips and fee data)

title: Implement Empire Dashboard & Analytics UI
description:
Implement the main Empire Dashboard that displays:
1.  **Financial Growth**: Track revenue, payment invoices (using data from Stripe/RevenueOracle), and profit margins.
2.  **Social Activity**: Real-time stats on how posts and videos are performing across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube (simulated for now).
3.  **AI Insights**: A section for AI-driven suggestions and trend research results to boost future performance.
4.  **Active Goals**: Status of current autonomous cycles and pending approvals.

Ensure the design is consistent with the Onboarding Wizard's high-tech aesthetic.

title: Research App Store Compliance & Email Marketing Laws
description: Research legal compliance requirements for automated email marketing (CAN-SPAM, GDPR, CASL) and App Store guidelines for AI-driven business apps. Provide a 'Legal Guardrails' document for the developers.

title: Architect Mobile App & Email Integration Engine
description:
Design the technical architecture for:
1.  Converting the current web app into a mobile app (iOS/Android).
2.  Linking user email accounts (Gmail, Outlook, etc.) via OAuth2.
3.  The 'Email Scripting Engine' that uses AI to draft messages based on customer interactions.

title: Design Mobile UX & Email Scripting Interface
description:
Design the mobile UI for:
1.  The 'Empire Command Center' (Mobile Dashboard).
2.  The 'Email Scripting Wizard' where users can view, edit, and approve AI-generated emails.
3.  Account linking screens for email and social platforms.

title: Implement Email Scripting & Mobile Backend Services
description:
Implement the backend services for the 'Email Scripting Engine':
1.  **Email Provider Integration**: Implement OAuth2 flows for Gmail and Outlook to allow secure account linking.
2.  **AI Scripting Service**: Create a service that uses the LLM to draft email responses based on customer inquiries, business niche, and user-defined goals.
3.  **Compliance Middleware**: Implement a check to ensure all AI-generated emails include mandatory legal elements (e.g., unsubscribe links, sender identity) as per the Technical Researcher's findings.
4.  **Mobile-Ready APIs**: Optimize existing endpoints for mobile access (token-based auth, push notification triggers).

title: Implement Mobile Command Center & Email Scripting UI
description:
Implement the 'Mobile Command Center' and 'Email Scripting Wizard' using React Native (shared core strategy).
1. **Mobile Command Center**: Build the main dashboard view for mobile, including the 'Empire Constellation' (optimized for small screens) and real-time revenue/growth charts.
2. **Email Scripting Wizard**: Implement the interface for reviewing AI-generated email drafts. Include 'Approve', 'Edit', and 'Regenerate' buttons.
3. **Push Notification Integration**: Set up the frontend handlers for FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging) to receive 'Approval Required' alerts.
4. **Biometric Auth Interface**: Implement the FaceID/TouchID unlock screen for financial and social actions.
Refer to `/home/team/shared/mobile_email_architecture.md` and the approved UX designs.

title: Research Social Commerce & Direct Payment Integrations
description:
Research social media 'Buy Button' and direct payment integration requirements.
The goal is to allow users to add bank info so the AI can create 'Buy' buttons on social posts (IG, FB, TikTok) where customers pay directly to the seller.
1. **Platform APIs**: Research Instagram/Facebook Shop, TikTok Shop, and Pinterest Shop APIs for direct checkout.
2. **Direct Payment Links**: Research Stripe Payment Links or PayPal Checkout integration that can be embedded in social media bios or captions.
3. **KYC & Security**: Identify requirements for collecting bank/tax info for direct payments while ensuring 'Admin Blindness' (we shouldn't see their private bank details).
4. **Platform Compliance**: Ensure these direct payment methods don't violate platform terms (e.g., Apple's in-app purchase rules for digital goods vs physical goods).

title: Implement ROI Forecasting & Analytics Engine
description:
Implement the 'ROI Forecasting & Analytics Engine' in the backend.
1. **Data Pipeline**: Implement a pipeline to ingest revenue data from linked accounts (Etsy, Stripe, etc.) into the internal ledger (RevenueOracle).
2. **BigQuery Integration**: Set up the integration with BigQuery as researched in `roi_forecasting_research.md`. Use BigQuery ML (ARIMA+) for sales forecasting.
3. **Trend Analysis Service**: Implement a service that analyzes engagement trends (from TikTok/IG APIs) and suggests listing optimizations or new content directions.
4. **Analytics API**: Create endpoints for the frontend to fetch real-time ROI, profit margins, and growth forecasts.
5. **Human-in-the-Loop Suggestions**: Ensure the AI generates 'Opportunity Cards' (as implemented in the dashboard UI) based on the analytics data.
Refer to `/home/team/shared/roi_forecasting_research.md` for methodology.

title: Research Empire Creation Automation (Canva + AI)
description:
Research and design the 'Empire Creation' automation flow.
1. **Market Intelligence**: Identify best-sellers in a specific business niche (e.g., Digital Journals on Etsy, Templates on Fiverr) using existing APIs or scraping strategies.
2. **AI Concept Generation**: Design the prompt orchestration to generate high-quality product concepts, titles, and SEO descriptions.
3. **Canva Automation**: Define the technical flow for programmatically creating designs in Canva (using the 'Design Import API' or the manual fallback flow researched previously).
4. **End-to-End Orchestration**: Map out the sequence of events from 'Research' to 'Draft Design' to 'Final Listing' in 'Empire Mode'.
Refer to `research_report.md` and `detailed_ux_specs.md` for context.

title: Implement Stripe Connect & Social Commerce Backend
description:
Implement the backend services for Stripe Connect and direct social commerce:
1. **Stripe Connect Onboarding**: Implement the OAuth/Standard onboarding flow for sellers to link their bank accounts securely.
2. **Stripe Payment Link Service**: Create a service that generates Stripe Payment Links for products (e.g., PDFs, digital goods) to be embedded in social posts.
3. **Meta Catalog Sync**: Implement the background sync for the Meta Catalog API to allow product tagging on Instagram/Facebook.
4. **TikTok Shop Integration**: Set up the TikTok Shop API integration for managing products and generating shopping links.
Ensure all operations maintain 'Admin Blindness' as per the security specs.

title: Deep-Dive: Automated Video & Graphic Tools (CapCut, Kittl, Adobe)
description:
Deep-dive into CapCut, Kittl, and Adobe Express APIs/Workflows for automated content creation.
1. **Free Path Focus**: Identify 'Free options first' as per the Team Goal. Explore how the AI can leverage free tiers of these tools.
2. **CapCut**: Research programmatic video editing or template injection. Is there a way for the AI to 'script' a video that the user then finalizes in CapCut?
3. **Kittl**: Investigate the Kittl developer program. Can we programmatically generate brand assets or use their templates?
4. **Adobe Express**: Research the Adobe Express Embed SDK or Add-on APIs for automated graphic generation.
5. **Anti-Copycat Logic**: Define a technical method for the AI to ensure designs are 'Similar but Distinct' and don't violate copyright.

title: Implement Canva-to-Listing Pipeline & S3 Staging
description:
Implement the Canva-to-Listing pipeline as detailed in `/home/team/shared/canva_listing_pipeline.md`. 
1. Create `canvaService.ts` to wrap the Canva Connect API (Autofill & Export endpoints).
2. Implement S3 staging for exported PDF/Graphic assets.
3. Integrate the pipeline into the `orchestrator.ts` to handle the transition from Niche Concept -> Canva Generation -> Asset Staging -> Listing Engine.
4. Ensure 'Admin Blindness' is maintained for all API credentials.

title: Design 'Empire Mode' Creation & Approval Flow
description:
Design the end-to-end user flow for 'Empire Mode' product creation. 
1. Map the transition from Niche Discovery (Research results) to AI Content Generation.
2. Design the interface for reviewing and approving Canva-generated assets (PDFs, Graphics) before they are listed.
3. Design the 'One-Tap Deploy' experience that triggers the Universal Listing Engine and Social Commerce posts.
4. Focus on mobile-first, high-intelligence feedback loops where the AI suggests adjustments.

title: Implement Anti-Copycat Validation Engine
description:
Implement the 'Anti-Copycat' validation engine to ensure all AI-generated designs and products are unique.
1. Implement Tier 1 (Geometric): Use Perceptual Hashing (dHash) to compare generated designs against top-selling niche competitors.
2. Implement Tier 2 (Semantic): Use CLIP Vector Embeddings to detect and pivot away from derivative compositional styles.
3. Implement Tier 3 (Critic): Integrate an AI Critic agent to perform final brand-voice and OCR checks.
Refer to `/home/team/shared/anti_copycat_logic.md` for technical specifications.

title: Research Fiverr API & Order Automation
description:
Research the Fiverr API capabilities for the 'bizrunner' app. 
1. Investigate if it's possible to programmatically create or update Gigs.
2. Research order management automation: Can the AI respond to customer messages or automate delivery of digital products (PDFs/Journals)?
3. Identify the authentication method (OAuth2 vs API Keys) and any 'Admin Blindness' constraints.
4. Evaluate how Fiverr fits into the 'Empire Mode'—can we automate the setup of a digital product service gig?

title: Design Fiverr Automation & Order Management UX
description:
Design the UX for Fiverr integration within the bizrunner app.
1. Map the flow for automated Gig setup (Service definition -> AI keyword optimization -> Listing).
2. Design the interface for 'Autonomous Order Management': How the user reviews AI-prepared responses to buyers and approves automated deliveries of digital products.
3. Design the 'Fiverr Success' dashboard widget showing active orders, delivery status, and AI-suggested gig optimizations.
4. Ensure the design follows the 'Thumb-Zone' and 'One-Handed' mobile-first principles established for other platforms.

title: Implement 'Empire Mode' Creation & Approval UI
description:
Implement the core 'Empire Mode' UI components for the mobile app.
1. Implement the **Opportunity Card** for the Strategic Insights feed.
2. Implement the **Product Blueprint** screen for reviewing AI concepts.
3. Implement the **Creative Review (HITL Gate)** screen for high-fidelity asset auditing and conversational editing.
4. Implement the **Deployment Console** animation showing the multi-platform publishing progress.
Refer to the UX spec in `/home/team/shared/designs/empire_mode_flow_spec.md` and the mockups in `/home/team/shared/designs/`. These should be high-performance React Native components.

title: Design Social Posting Gate & Campaign UX
description:
Design the UX for the 'Social Posting Gate' & Campaign Scheduler. 
1. Map the flow for setting up autonomous social media campaigns (Frequency, Tone, Target Outlets).
2. Design the 'Pre-Post Review' interaction: How a user receives a notification, views the AI-generated post draft (image/video + caption), and approves or edits it before it goes live.
3. Design the interface for 'Conversational Rescheduling' (e.g., 'Post this 2 hours later' or 'Wait for my approval on the next 3 posts').
4. Ensure the design adheres to the 'Thumb-Zone' and mobile-first principles established in previous specs.
5. Create a dashboard view for the 'Content Calendar' that shows upcoming autonomous posts.

title: Implement Social Posting Gate & Campaign Backend
description:
Implement the Social Campaign & Posting Gate backend services.
1. Implement the **Campaign Orchestrator** to manage social media schedules based on frequency, tone, and niche.
2. Integrate the **Pre-Post Notification** logic: When a post is scheduled, trigger a mobile notification via `notificationService.ts` for user review.
3. Implement the **Posting Approval Queue**: Hold AI-generated social drafts (from the creative engine) until a user approval is received.
4. Support **Conversational Rescheduling** (e.g., 'post this in 1 hour') by updating the scheduled job in the queue.
5. Use `metaService.ts` and `tiktokShopService.ts` for the final publishing execution.

title: Implement Social Posting Gate & Compliance UI
description:
Implement the Social Posting Gate, Campaign UI, and Legal Compliance screens in the mobile app.
1. Implement the **Pre-Post Review** screen for AI-generated social posts, allowing users to view, edit, or approve drafts before they go live.
2. Implement the **Content Calendar** dashboard view to visualize the upcoming social media schedule.
3. Integrate **Conversational Rescheduling** into the posting gate (UI for shifting post times).
4. Implement **Legal Compliance & Safety UI**: Explicit data-sharing prompts for account linking, hardcoded legal footers in communications, and the user reporting system for AI content.
5. Follow the 'Side-to-Unlock' pattern for high-liability actions as defined in the UX spec.
Refer to `/home/team/shared/designs/social_posting_gate_ux.md` and `/home/team/shared/designs/legal_compliance_ux.md`.

title: Research Social Trend Discovery APIs (TikTok, IG, YT)
description: Research programmatic methods to discover trending hashtags and topics on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. Identify APIs (official or 3rd party like Apify) that can provide real-time trend data to fuel the 'Empire Mode' proactive suggestions. Focus on data that can be used to suggest content ideas to users.

title: Upgrade Orchestrator to High-Intelligence Dynamic Planner
description: Upgrade the core LangGraph Orchestrator to use an LLM-driven planning step. Currently, 'planNode' returns a static list of tasks. It should instead analyze the user's high-level goal and current state to dynamically generate a sequence of task steps (e.g., niche research, product concept, creative generation, listing, social posting). This allows the AI to truly 'problem solve' and determine the best execution order as requested in the goal. Use a 'Critic' pattern where the plan is reviewed for strategic alignment before execution.

title: Implement Fiverr 'Copy-Paste Power Tool' & Inbox Assistant UI
description:
Implement the 'Copy-Paste Power Tool' for Fiverr Gigs and the 'Inbox Assistant' review UI. 
- The Copy-Paste tool should allow users to easily copy AI-generated Gig components (Title, Tags, Description, Pricing).
- The Inbox Assistant should show a buyer message and an AI-drafted reply for approval. 
Refer to /home/team/shared/designs/fiverr_automation_ux.md for the UI specs.

title: Research Performance Analytics & Post-Purchase Automation APIs
description:
Research programmatic methods to track business growth and social performance:
1. **Performance Analytics APIs:** Identify how to fetch view, like, and engagement data for a user's own content on TikTok (TikTok for Business API), Instagram (Graph API), and YouTube (Data API).
2. **Post-Purchase Automation:** Research if Etsy and Fiverr allow programmatic sending of 'Thank You' messages or review requests. Specifically, look for 'Conversations API' or 'Order Management' endpoints.
3. **Growth Metrics:** Identify best practices for calculating 'Empire Growth' (e.g., MoM Revenue, Engagement Rate) and how to ingest this data into our 'Revenue Oracle'.
Focus on maintaining the 'Admin Blindness' and security standards already established.

title: Scale & Monetization Architecture Update
description:
Update the technical blueprint to reflect the new business constraints and monetization model:
1. Limit to 3 businesses per account.
2. Monetization: $30 per business unlock + standard subscription fee + dynamic $30 surcharge for every $1000 revenue.
3. Architecture for scaling: Ensure the system can handle millions of concurrent subscribers without lag (cloud architecture, load balancing, DB partitioning).
4. Define the protocol for 'Business Abandonment/Swapping' (how state is archived/reset).
5. Address the 'Link any app' requirement: Propose an extensible integration architecture (OAuth2, Webhooks, Deep Links).

title: Legal & Business Management UX Design
description:
Design the user flow and interface for the new business management and legal compliance requirements:
1. **Onboarding & T&C**: A mandatory legal agreement screen (Disclaimer/Terms) with the specific clauses provided by the owner (Liability protection, waiver of sue rights, effort-based success disclaimer, fraud deactivation policy).
2. **Business Manager**: UI for managing up to 3 businesses. Include the 'Abandon/Swap' functionality where a user can retire a business to start a new one.
3. **Monetization UI**: Clear representation of the $30 unlock fee and the dynamic $30/$1000 revenue surcharge.
4. **App Linking**: An intuitive interface for linking 'any app' on phone/laptop (integrations dashboard).

title: Business Limit, Monetization & Safety Logic Implementation
description:
Implement core business logic updates:
1. Reduce the maximum number of active businesses per account from 5 to 3.
2. Update the `revenueOracle.ts` and subscription service to implement the new pricing:
   - $30 flat fee to unlock a new business slot.
   - Dynamic surcharge: Auto-bill $30 for every $1000 in revenue tracked.
3. Implement the 'Business Swapping' backend: Provide an endpoint to 'Abandon' a business (archiving its data) and free up a slot for a new one.
4. Implement the 'Fraud Sentinel' logic: A service that monitors for fraudulent/scam patterns and triggers immediate account deactivation (lockout, no refund).
5. Add a `terms_accepted_version` field to the user profile and ensure no subscription can be active without T&C acceptance.

title: Legal, Business Manager & Monetization UI Implementation
description:
Implement the UI for legal onboarding and business management:
1. **Legal Shield**: Create a mandatory onboarding screen with scroll-to-accept logic for the T&C (Liability, Waiver of Suit, Effort-based Success, Fraud Deactivation).
2. **Empire Hub**: Implement the dashboard for 3 business slots. Include the 'Abandon & Swap' flow with the name-confirmation safeguard.

title: Implement Analytics OAuth2 & Webhook Integrations
description: Based on the researcher's findings, implement OAuth2 flows for TikTok (Display API v2), Instagram (Graph API), and YouTube (Analytics API). title: Implement Growth Analytics & Inbox Assistant UI
description:
Implement the next phase of high-intelligence UI components:
1. Empire Growth Widget: A dashboard component displaying the 'Empire Growth Score' using the researched formula: (0.5 * MoM_Revenue) + (0.3 * Engagement_Growth) + (0.2 * Content_Consistency). Include trend lines for each metric.

Use the researcher's report at `/home/team/shared/analytics_automation_research.md` for metric details.

title: Pay Button & Email Assistant UX Design
description:
Design the UX for the following high-priority features:

2. Gmail Inbox Assistant: A specialized view for managing customer inquiries via Gmail, showing AI-drafted responses for approval.

Ensure these designs are consistent with the 'Empire Hub' and 'Integrations Hub' aesthetics.

title: Research Kittl & CapCut Integrations
description:
Research the integration possibilities for Kittl and CapCut. Specifically:

4. Research strategies to ensure content uniqueness (anti-copycat) when using these templates.
Document your findings in `/home/team/shared/content_platform_research.md`.

title: Implement Backend for Pay Button & Gmail Assistant
description:
Implement Backend for Pay Button & Gmail Inbox Assistant:
1. Gmail: Add service methods to list messages, fetch content, and generate AI drafts (use aiScriptingService).
2. Pay Button: Expand stripeService to support customizable button metadata (color, text) and store 'Payment Button' entities in the DB.
3. Automation: Implement logic to trigger email drafts on Etsy sales (webhook) or manual requests.
Integrate with the existing service architecture.

title: Implement Pay Button & Gmail Assistant UI
description:
Implement the UI for the Pay Button Generator and Gmail Inbox Assistant as per the approved UX designs:
1. Pay Button Generator Screen: Allow users to customize button text, color, price, and shape. Include AI style recommendations.
2. Gmail Inbox Assistant Screen: Implement the side-by-side view (Email | AI Draft) with approval actions (Approve & Send, Refine, Manual Edit).

title: Formalize Withholding & Reversion Protocol
description:
Formalize the 'Withholding & Reversion Protocol' in the technical specification:
1. Define the 'Escrow Withholding' logic where the system calculates 'Pending Dues' (upcoming subscription fee + unpaid $30 revenue surcharges).
2. Specify the 'Withdrawal Lock' mechanism that prevents users from withdrawing funds earmarked for dues.
3. Detail the 'Owner Sweep' protocol for account cancellations, ensuring all outstanding revenue surcharges are reverted to the platform owner before final payout.
Update `tech_spec.md` and any relevant architecture docs.

title: Implement Kittl & CapCut Blueprint Engine & Anti-Copycat Logic
description:
Implement the 'Manual Assisted' blueprint logic for Kittl and CapCut:
1. Blueprint Engine: Create a service that generates design blueprints (template recommendations, AI-generated copy, stylistic instructions) for digital products.
2. Anti-Copycat Validation: Integrate the `perceptual-hashing-node` skill to ensure AI-generated design concepts are technically distinct from best-sellers.
3. Free-Tier Priority: Program the AI to prioritize non-Pro templates and free stock assets.
Refer to the research in `/home/team/shared/content_platform_research.md`.

title: Implement Kittl & CapCut Manual Assisted UI
description:
Implement UI support for Kittl and CapCut 'Manual Assisted' workflows:
1. Integration Hub Updates: Add 'Clipboard Helper' and 'Template Launcher' for Kittl and CapCut.
2. Design Blueprint UI: Implement a screen or modal that displays the AI-generated blueprints (template link, copy, instructions) for manual execution.
3. uniqueness/Validation: Show the 'Anti-Copycat' validation status (e.g., 'Uniqueness Verified') for generated concepts.
Refer to Kittl/CapCut research in `/home/team/shared/content_platform_research.md`.

title: Implement Frontend for Pay Button & Gmail Assistant
description:
Implement the user-facing interfaces for the Pay Button Customizer and the Gmail Assistant Dashboard.

Key Components:
1. Pay Button Customizer:
   - UI for selecting button text, colors, and rounding.
   - Integration with the backend `POST /api/stripe/payment-button` to generate Stripe Payment Links.
   - Preview of the button.
2. Gmail Assistant:
   - Inbox view fetching from `/api/email/gmail/inbox`.
   - Message detail view fetching from `/api/email/gmail/message/:id`.
   - Notification display for AI-drafted emails (triggered by Etsy sales).
   - UI for reviewing, editing, and sending the drafted emails.

Reference the design artifacts in /home/team/shared/pay_button_email_assistant_ux.md.

title: Implement Revenue Protection & Milestone Withholding Logic
description:
Implement the Revenue Protection and Milestone Withholding logic as defined in the 'Withholding & Reversion Protocol'.

Specific Requirements:
1. Milestone Trigger: When a user's total revenue reaches $1,000, the system must calculate 'Pending Dues'.
2. Withholding Amount: At the $1,000 milestone, withhold a $30 subscription fee AND a $30 'Success Fee' (total $60).
3. Withdrawal Lock: Prevent users from withdrawing funds if their 'Available to Withdraw' balance is less than their 'Pending Dues' (subscription + revenue surcharges). This must be enforced at the backend/Stripe Connect level.
4. Default Payment Flow: If a user has not reached the revenue threshold or has insufficient funds, ensure the system still prompts for manual subscription payment.
5. Suspension Logic: Implement a check to suspend user accounts if the monthly subscription remains unpaid (no revenue to withhold from and no manual payment).
6. Admin Sweep: Ensure the owner can sweep these withheld dues to the platform's primary Stripe account.

Reference: /home/team/shared/tech_spec.md Section 8.3.

title: Implement Scheduled Posting & Approval Engine
description:
Implement the scheduled social media posting engine with a mandatory human-in-the-loop approval flow.

Key Features:
1. Posting Engine: Support for TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook (using existing Meta/TikTok APIs).
2. Approval Workflow:
   - When the AI generates a post, it must NOT post immediately.
   - It should create a notification/pending post record.
   - Send a notification to the user asking them to 'View and Approve' before it goes live.
3. Scheduling: Allow the AI or user to set specific times for posts.
4. 'Success Goals' Integration: The AI should propose posts that align with the user's defined business goals.

Reference: 'design-ai-approval-workflow' skill for implementation details.

title: Implement Best Seller Search & Automated Listing Engine
description:
Implement the 'Best Seller & Automated Listing' engine.

Core requirements:
1. Etsy/Marketplace Search: Implement a service to search for 'best sellers' in a given niche (using Etsy API or scraping if necessary, prioritized by Etsy API).
2. Design Idea Generation: Use the AI to analyze these best sellers and generate a 'similar but unique' design idea (Blueprints).
3. Automated Listing: 
   - Generate SEO-optimized titles and descriptions using 'best keywords for sales and traction'.
   - Automate the creation of a draft listing on Etsy (using Etsy API).
4. Human-in-the-Loop: Ensure listings are created as 'drafts' or require approval before going live.

Reference the 'perceptual-hashing-node' skill to ensure uniqueness.

title: Design Dashboard Walkthrough & Pricing Story
description:
Design the 'First Launch Dashboard Walkthrough' for new subscribers.

Key Requirements:
1. Trigger: Plays automatically when a user logs in for the first time after subscribing.
2. Dashboard Tour: Highlight key areas (Growth Score, Empire Hub, Assistant, Marketing Pulse) and explain their purpose.
3. Pricing Explanation (The 'Sincere Story'): 
   - Explain the \$30 monthly subscription and the \$30 success fees for every \$1,000 made.
   - Craft a thoughtful, sincere message explaining that we provide all the high-intelligence tools upfront for their success, and they only pay a 'Success Fee' from what they earn. 
   - Emphasize the mutual benefit: 'We grow only when you grow.'
4. Call to Action: Instruct the user on the very first steps to take to 'start thriving' (e.g., 'Connect your first platform' or 'Set your first goal').

Deliverables:
- UX flow for the walkthrough (modals or tooltips).
- Sincere copy for the pricing explanation.
- High-fidelity mockup of the pricing story screen.

title: Implement Functional Social Posting & Approval UI
description:

title: Implement Progressive Dashboard & Guided Linking UI
description:
Overhaul the Dashboard (src/app/(authenticated)/dashboard/page.tsx) to support a progressive 'Empty State' for new users:

I will personally walk you through what needs to be done! Let's start with your email, that way I can get some codes that will be required and you won't have to go back and forth.'

Secure handling of 'App Passwords'. 2. IMAP search performance for the Neural Discovery scanning logic. 3. Privacy compliance for non-OAuth connections. title: Update Empire Teacher script in Guided Linking UI

title: Implement Strategic Orchestration Engine
description:
Implement the 'Strategic Orchestrator' (The Brain of Bizrunner):
1. Create `src/services/strategyOrchestrator.ts`.
2. This service should:
    a. Take an `empireId`.
    b. Fetch the empire's details (niche, angle).
    c. Call `marketIntelligenceService.fetchEtsyBestSellers` and `fetchVisualTrends`.
    d. Use `ChatOpenAI` (see `aiScriptingService.ts`) to synthesize this data into a "Growth Roadmap".
    e. The roadmap should consist of 3-5 high-impact "Strategy Blueprints".
3. Add a `POST /api/agent/strategy/generate` endpoint in `agentController.ts` that:
    a. Invokes the orchestrator.
    b. For each blueprint, creates a `task` in the database linked to the empire's main goal.
    c. These tasks should be marked as `status: 'todo'` and have their `result` field pre-populated with the AI's step-by-step reasoning and execution guide (e.g., 'Use Kittl template X', 'Target keywords Y').
4. Implement a `GET /api/agent/strategy/:empireId` to fetch these strategic tasks.
5. Ensure the AI prompt emphasizes the 'problem solve' and 'execute in best order' requirements from the team goal.

title: Autonomous Onboarding Architecture

title: Implement Empire Engine Orchestrator Agent (Core Brain)

4. Ensure HITL gates are respected at each required state.
5. Implement the Reengagement Loop (Invoicing, Thank You, Review Harvest).

title: Build Empire Engine Interactive Approval Gates (HITL)
description:
Build the Interactive Approval Gates for the Empire Creation Engine:
1. Blueprint Gate: A UI component to display the 30-day strategy roadmap (products, pricing, marketing frequency) for user approval/editing.
2. Visual Draft Gate: A carousel or grid view to preview generated assets (PDFs, videos, social posts). Include a "Star" rating or "Approve" button.
3. Go-Live Gate: A final pre-deployment confirmation screen showing the post/listing preview and bank info verification.
4. Integrate these gates with the `ApprovalService` backend.
5. Reference Section 3 of /home/team/shared/Empire_Engine_Orchestration_Spec.md for details.

title: Design Design Center & Creative Blueprint UX Components
description:
1. Design the 'Design Center' UI: A hub for non-API platforms (Kittl, CapCut, Canva Free).
2. Design 'Creative Blueprint' Component: A view that displays AI-generated design instructions, color palettes, font pairings, and scripts.
3. Design 'Copy-Paste Power Tool': A UX element (e.g., a floating bar or sidebar) that allows one-click copying of specific blueprint elements (titles, body text, tags) for easy transfer to external tabs.
4. Design the 'Visual Variation' interface: Show how the AI presents 'Similar but Distinct' options to the user to avoid copycat designs.
5. Reference research in /home/team/shared/content_platform_research.md.

title: Implement 'Copy-Paste Power Tool' & Manual-Assisted UI Components
description:
Build the UI components for the 'Manual Assisted' workflow. This includes a sidebar/floating panel that guides the user through manual steps for platforms like Kittl and Capcut. Features:
1. One-click copy buttons for AI-generated text/blueprints.
2. Deep-link buttons to launch external platforms (Kittl, Capcut).
3. A progress checklist for manual tasks.
4. Integration with the existing 'Visual Draft Gate' to transition into manual execution mode.
5. Use the 'Copy-Paste Power Tool' name for the sidebar.

title: Design Empire Growth & Analytics Dashboard UX
description:
Design the UX for the 'Empire Growth & Analytics Dashboard'. This is the central hub for the user to monitor their business success.
Key Requirements:
1. **Revenue Tracker**: Visualize earnings with a focus on growth milestones (e.g., tracking the first $1,000, then $5,000, etc.).
2. **Multi-Platform Activity Feed**: A unified view of all activity across Etsy, Fiverr, TikTok, Instagram, etc.
3. **Video Analytics**: Detailed performance metrics for social media posts (views, engagement, conversion).
4. **Trend Intelligence UI**: An interface for the AI to present trend research and "Pivot Suggestions" (e.g., "This video is trending, I suggest making a part 2 or a related product").
5. **CRM & Retention Hub**: Manage automated "Thank You" emails and review harvesting status.
6. **Invoicing & Payments**: A view for trackable payment invoices and Stripe settlement status.

Deliver high-fidelity mockups and a UX specification.

title: Implement Empire Pulse & Activity Stream UI Components
description:
Implement the 'Empire Pulse' and 'Real-time Activity Stream' components to visualize the autonomous actions of the Empire Engine.
Requirements:
1. **Empire Pulse**: A high-fidelity visual indicator showing the current state of the AI Orchestrator (e.g., 'Discovering Niche', 'Orchestrating Production', 'Deploying Empire').
2. **Activity Stream**: A scrollable feed of all autonomous events (e.g., 'Drafted ADHD Planner PDF', 'Posted to TikTok', 'Sent 5 Thank-You Emails').
3. **Real-time Updates**: Use a mock WebSocket/Polling mechanism to simulate real-time status updates from the backend.
4. **Actionable Items**: Activity items should have 'View' buttons that deep-link to the relevant preview gates or platform links.
5. **Dashboard Integration**: Place these components prominently on the authenticated dashboard.
6. Use premium AI-themed animations (pulses, glows) to reinforce the 'High Intelligence' brand.

title: Research Fiverr & YouTube Integration Strategies
description:
Research automation strategies and API capabilities for Fiverr and YouTube.
Requirements:
1. **Fiverr**: Can we programmatically create/edit profiles or "Act-as-User" to manage orders? Check for official APIs vs. web automation (Puppeteer/Browser) strategies.
2. **YouTube**: Check the YouTube Data API for video uploads, metadata management, and analytics.
3. **Security**: Ensure all strategies adhere to the "Admin Blindness" and "Privacy First" protocols.
4. **Free Options**: Identify ways to use these platforms without incurring extra costs (e.g., free upload tiers).

Provide a research report at `/home/team/shared/fiverr_youtube_research.md`.

title: Design Settings & Support Hub UX
description:
Design a 'Settings & Support Hub' for the EmpireLaunch AI app. 
Key components:
1. **Access Point**: A 'Settings' button in the main dashboard header or sidebar.
2. **Support Section**:
    - **'Contact EmpireLaunch AI Support'**: A prominent button for the business owner to reach out for technical help or billing issues.
    - **'Support Issue Tracker'**: A simple list showing the status of their reported issues.
3. **Customer Support Manager (CRM Extension)**:
    - An interface where the AI flags messages from the user's *own* customers (e.g. from Etsy/Social DMs) that need attention.
    - AI-generated "Suggested Replies" for these customer issues.
4. **General Settings**: Profile management, Notification preferences, and Subscription status (reflecting the $30/mo per business model).

Provide high-fidelity mockups and update the UX specification.

title: Design Social Proof Loop (Rating & Marketing Integration)
description:
Design the 'Social Proof Loop' as requested by the owner. 
1. Add a high-visibility 'Rate the App' component to the Support Hub.
2. Design a 'Social Proof Approval Hub' in the Command Center where positive reviews (4-5 stars) are flagged.
3. Design the interaction where the owner can 'Approve for Marketing' - which pushes the review to the AI's social media content engine.
4. Update the detailed UX specs.

title: Implement Social Proof Loop (Backend)
description:
Implement the 'Social Proof Loop' backend logic:
1. Create an API endpoint to receive app ratings (1-5 stars) from the frontend.
2. If rating is 4 or 5 stars, flag the review for 'Marketing Approval' in the database.
3. Implement a 'Push to Marketing' trigger that allows the owner to approve a review, which then queues it for the Social Media engine to create a post (e.g., 'Another 5-star review for our [Product]!').
4. Ensure data is stored securely.

title: Implement Social Proof Loop (Frontend)
description:
Implement the 'Social Proof Loop' UI components based on the UX design (to be provided by UX designer):

2. 'Social Proof Approval Hub' in the Command Center (Dashboard).
3. Connect the components to the new backend endpoints for submitting ratings and approving reviews.
4. Add animations for high ratings.

title: Research Multi-Payment Bridge (Stripe, PayPal, Venmo, Cash App)
description:
Research the technical implementation for 'Multi-Payment Bridge' integration.
1. Investigate Stripe's native support for Venmo and Cash App (via Payment Element/Checkout).
2. Define the process for AI-assisted linking of PayPal Business accounts alongside Stripe.
3. Research 'Instant Payouts' capabilities to bank accounts/debit cards for the 'Sellers Bank Account' requirement.
4. Document the security protocols for safeguarding both seller and customer payment info.
5. Create a 'Financial Connection Blueprint' for the developers.

title: Design Internal Feedback Loop for App Improvement
description:
Refine the Social Proof Loop and Support Hub UX:
1. Ensure that ALL user feedback (1-5 stars + comments) is captured and presented in an 'Internal Feedback' view for the business owner.
2. This view should be separate from the 'Social Proof Approval Hub' (which is for marketing only).
3. The owner needs this to 'adjust the app at times and make it better'.
4. Update the detailed UX specs (Section 26) to reflect this internal feedback loop.

title: Design Localization & Currency Selector (Onboarding)
description:
Update the Landing Page and Onboarding UX to include a 'Localization & Currency' selector:
1. Add a high-visibility 'Language & Currency' selector/tab right above the 'Get Started' button.
2. This ensures the AI can 'speak effectively' in the user's preferred language and display all financial data in their local currency.
3. Update the onboarding flow to persist these preferences.
4. Update the detailed UX specs.

title: Implement Multi-Payment Bridge (Backend)
description:
Implement the Multi-Payment Bridge based on the research blueprint (/home/team/shared/financial_connection_blueprint.md):
1. Update Stripe integration to enable Venmo and Cash App Pay in checkout sessions.
2. Implement the OAuth flow for linking PayPal Business accounts.
3. Add support for 'Instant Payouts' configuration in the user's financial settings.
4. Ensure all tokens are stored in the encrypted Vault with AES-256-GCM.
5. Provide API endpoints for the frontend to manage these connections.

title: Implement Account Tiers & Generate Access Keys
description:
Implement the Account Tier and Access Key system:
1. Logic for 3 account tiers:
   - OWNER_MASTER: Unlimited businesses, $0 monthly sub, $0 success fees.
   - BETA_TESTER: Unlimited businesses, $0 monthly sub, $30/$1,000 success fees.
   - STANDARD_USER: Limited businesses (up to 3), $30/mo sub, $30/$1,000 success fees.
2. Generate 1 unique 'Owner Master Key' (Forever Free) and 1 'Beta Tester Key' ($0 sub, normal fees).
3. Ensure these keys are stored securely and bypass the standard payment onboarding flow when used.
4. Output the two keys as the task result for the lead to provide to the owner.

title: Research Bannerbear Integration
description: Research Bannerbear API and integration possibilities for automated social media asset generation. Document endpoints, authentication, and create a technical spec for integration into the Empire Creation Engine. Ensure it follows the 'Free-First' protocol (check for free tier/API limits).

title: Add Bannerbear to Connected Apps UI
description: Add Bannerbear to the 'Connected Apps' list in the Onboarding flow and Settings. Use the Bannerbear logo and provide a 'Connect' button that triggers the OAuth/API key entry flow. Reference the 'Creative Blueprint' for how it fits into the design workflow.

title: Design Success Hub Dashboard
description: Design the 'Success Hub' dashboard component. This hub should show activity across all linked social and marketplace apps (Etsy, TikTok, YouTube, etc.). It must track video performance (views/likes), sales growth, and payment invoices. Include a 'Neural Activity' feed that shows what the AI is currently thinking and executing. Research how the AI can 'create buttons on social media posts so people can click it and pay you for the item and the money goes directly into the sellers bank account' for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.
- Investigate TikTok Shop 'Product Links' in videos.
- Investigate Instagram 'Shopping Tags' and 'Checkout on Instagram'.

title: Implement Success Hub Dashboard
description:
Implement the 'Success Hub' dashboard component based on the UX designs in `/home/team/shared/designs/success_hub_ux.md`. 
- Incorporate the Neural Activity feed.
- Add cross-platform performance tracking (views/likes/sales).
- Implement the 'Growth Burst' success animations for revenue milestones.

title: Design Free-First & Anti-Copycat Orchestration
description:
Design the logic for the AI Orchestrator to:
1. **Prioritize Free Assets**: When generating content via Canva, Kittl, CapCut, or Bannerbear, the AI must first scan and select free-tier templates and assets.
2. **MFA/Subscription Gate**: If a 'Pro' asset is necessary for the strategy, the AI must trigger a HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) approval gate with a cost breakdown before proceeding.
3. **Anti-Copycat Validation**: Define the 'Similarity Check' protocol. The AI must hash generated designs and compare them against a global 'Originality Index' to ensure no two users' outputs are too similar.
4. **Intellectual Transformation**: Specify how the AI 'learns' from best sellers (Etsy/TikTok) without copying—identifying key success elements (color palette, font style) and applying them to new, unique concepts.
Reference 'anti_copycat_logic.md' and 'Empire_Engine_Orchestration_Spec.md'.

title: Implement Originality & Anti-Copycat Service
description: Implement the `originalityService.ts` according to the approved `/home/team/shared/free_first_anti_copycat_spec.md`. Use dHash (geometric) and CLIP (semantic) validation pipelines to ensure all generated assets are unique and non-derivative. Integrate with the `originality_registry` table in the database.

title: Design Social Commerce Payment Bridge
description:
Design the technical bridge for 'Direct-to-Bank' payment buttons on social media posts. This should include:

title: Architect 'Strategic Intellect' Reasoning Engine
description:
Design the technical architecture for the 'Strategic Intellect' layer. This is the core reasoning engine that enables the AI to:
1. Problem-solve by decomposing high-level business goals into sequential execution steps.
2. Prioritize tasks based on 'Empire Health' and ROI potential.
3. Manage the state transition between discovery, production, and marketing.
4. Define the logic for the 'Neural Discovery Service' (searching for best sellers and creating similar but unique design ideas).
Reference the owner's requirement for 'better than ChatGPT intellectual thinking'.

title: Implement Strategic Intellect (Reasoning Engine)
description:
Implement the 'Strategic Intellect' reasoning engine as per the approved `/home/team/shared/Strategic_Intellect_Reasoning_Engine.md`.

2. Implement the Empire Health Score (EHS) and Predicted ROI prioritization logic.
3. Build the Neural Market Discovery Service for trend extraction and DNA-based ideation.

title: Research Etsy/Fiverr Search & Listing APIs
description: Research how to programmatically search for 'best sellers' on Etsy and Fiverr. Identify available APIs (or 'Manual Assisted' scraping methods) to extract keywords, pricing, and visual trends from top-performing listings in specific niches (e.g., Digital Journals, PDFs). Research the legal/TOS implications of automated listing creation and suggest the best 'Manual Assisted' or 'API-driven' approach for the bizrunner app.

title: Design Empire Command Gates & Reasoning UI
description:
Design the 'Empire Command Gates' (Approval Queues) and the 'Strategic Reasoning' modal for the Success Hub.
1. Approval Queue: A list of pending AI actions (Product Creation, Market Entry, Social Posting) that require user approval.
2. Strategic Reasoning Modal: A detailed view for each pending action that shows the AI's 'Why' layer (reasoning behind the action), a preview of the content/product, estimated ROI, and potential costs.
3. Interaction: Simple 'Approve', 'Reject', and 'Refine' (feedback) buttons.
4. Aesthetic: High-Intelligence Dark Mode, matching the Success Hub.

title: Design Manual Assisted Blueprint UIs
description:
Design the 'Manual Assisted' Blueprint views for Fiverr, CapCut, and Kittl.
1. Gig Blueprint (Fiverr): A structured view showing the AI-generated Title, Description, Tags, and Pricing with 'One-Click Copy' buttons for each field.
2. Script/Asset Blueprint (CapCut): A view showing the generated script, overlay text, and a list of required assets (links to stock media).
3. Design Blueprint (Kittl): A view with design directions, color palettes, font pairings, and a link to the base template.
4. Aesthetic: Consistent with the Success Hub (Glass-morphism, Dark Mode).
